name: R
operational_definition: Operational residue, risk or unresolved load used to slow, hold or block action when evidence and coherence are insufficient.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: Not a universal physical law in this canon pass.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Input to regime, Phi_eff, ActionGate and code-delta gates.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Calibration remains local and demo/proxy unless measured against outcomes.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: numeric field R in concept, PSI state or gate report
IOI_recompilation.runtime_target: observacion_engineering, obs-safe-integration-kit, obsai-core and Brain OS docs
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: R is bounded, cited, classified and never used as public science without calibration.

invariants: R must not silently approve actions
falsifiers: R is used without source evidence
R exceeds J_c and an action still auto-approves
a public claim presents R as validated science

gates.condition: R is proxy or calibration is missing
R is used as public scientific proof without calibration

safety_notes: Mathematical status is proxy_operacional, not proof of a new law.

name: Phi_eff
operational_definition: Operational integration efficiency used to measure whether evidence reduces residue enough to continue.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: Not a validated consciousness or physics metric.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Reduces or blocks gate confidence depending on residue and evidence.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Thresholds are local and must be calibrated before external claims.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: Phi_eff field or phiEff score in gate report
IOI_recompilation.runtime_target: observacion_engineering, ResidueOS, obs-safe and DUAT Genesis
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Phi_eff remains bounded and paired with R/evidence in reports.

invariants: Phi_eff cannot authorize public claims by itself
falsifiers: Phi_eff rises while evidence is empty
Phi_eff is used as a standalone proof
gate approves when Phi_eff is below local threshold

gates.condition: Phi_eff is proxy or threshold is demo-only
Phi_eff is marketed as validated science

safety_notes: Use as operational proxy only until outcome calibration exists.

name: J_c
operational_definition: Local jamming threshold used to compare residue against system tolerance before allowing action.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: Not a universal constant.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Blocks or holds execution when R reaches system tolerance.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Needs per-system calibration and cannot be copied across projects blindly.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: J_c field in metrics, PSI state or gate context
IOI_recompilation.runtime_target: ActionGate, ObsGate, EstadoPSI and Brain OS docs
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Any R >= J_c condition prevents automatic approval.

invariants: J_c must be explicit or defaulted in code
evidence_required: code path where threshold is applied
falsifiers: threshold is absent in a mathematical claim

gates.condition: J_c value is inherited or local-only
R >= J_c and action has side effects

safety_notes: Treat J_c as local operating threshold, not scientific proof.

name: Sigma
operational_definition: Compact signature of an observed state derived from R, Phi_eff, J_c and related gate fields.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: Sigma is an operational profile, not an ontological proof.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Packages state for envelopes, reports and policy review.
DO_deconstruction.residue: The signature is only as reliable as the cited metric inputs.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: sigma_signature object or sigma field
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Sigma includes source metrics and does not replace evidence.

invariants: Sigma does not approve action alone
falsifiers: Sigma is emitted without source metrics
Sigma is used to bypass ActionGate
Sigma is marketed as validated physics

gates.condition: Sigma summarizes proxy metrics
Sigma is used as standalone proof

safety_notes: Keep Sigma internal until calibration and claim review exist.

name: ObservationEnvelope
operational_definition: Normalized evidence object that binds source, claim level, evidence, falsifiers, risk flags, gate and fingerprint before agent use.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: Envelope records evidence; it does not make weak claims true.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Moves observations between COMMS, obsai-core, L1 and ActionGate.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Missing fields degrade to REVIEW or validation failure.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: JSON object conforming to observation-envelope schema
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Schema validates and at least one evidence item is present.

gates.condition: shape and evidence pass local validation
legacy record lacks envelope

safety_notes: Do not treat envelope existence as publication permission.

name: ActionGate
operational_definition: Pre-action policy layer that maps evidence, R, host state, risk and authorization into APPROVE, REVIEW or BLOCK decisions.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: Gate approval is local permission only, not external publication approval.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Prevents unsafe, external, destructive or unevidenced actions.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Gate state must be refreshed before external actions.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: ActionGate decision record with evidence references
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Decision is explainable, logged and respects REVIEW/BLOCK.

invariants: missing evidence cannot approve strong claims

gates.condition: local reversible action with evidence and low risk
secrets, destructive actions, private boundary or strong claim without evidence

safety_notes: No push, deploy, Gumroad, social, deletion or heavy model action without specific gate.

name: GhostGate
operational_definition: Pre-approval stress projection that blocks or downgrades actions when simulated ghost R or Phi_eff would break tolerance.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: Ghost state is a safety simulation, not a prophecy.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Prevents optimistic approval before measuring likely residue impact.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Projection quality depends on current local formula and evidence.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: ghost_state block in observacion_engineering output
IOI_recompilation.runtime_target: observacion_engineering and DUAT OS orchestrator reports
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Approval downgrades when ghost thresholds fail.

falsifiers: APPROVE emitted despite ghost_R threshold failure
projection is presented as real-world forecast

gates.condition: projection is local proxy
ghost projection fails hard threshold

safety_notes: Use GhostGate to reduce R, not to claim predictive certainty.

name: WitnessLog
operational_definition: Append-only evidence ledger for actions, hashes, outputs, rules, status and event fingerprints.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: WitnessLog records evidence; it does not guarantee correctness of claims.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Provides durable proof trail for agent decisions and artifacts.
DO_deconstruction.residue: If a witness event is missing, closure remains REVIEW.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: JSONL witness event conforming to schema
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Event parses, cites hashes and preserves append-only lineage.

gates.condition: witness absent or incomplete
append-only event validates for local closure

safety_notes: Do not use witness logs to launder unevidenced public claims.

name: COMMS
operational_definition: Local append-only file protocol for inbox, outbox, topics, agent state and handoff coordination.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: COMMS is local coordination, not external networking or publication.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Routes agent observations and handoffs through envelopes and gates.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Legacy topic rows without envelopes must be superseded, not rewritten.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: COMMS folder with schemas and append-only streams
IOI_recompilation.runtime_target: Claudio agent_comms and Mission Control read-only routes
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Validator and tests can read state without mutating history.

gates.condition: local read/write envelope event validates
ownership or envelope evidence is uncertain

safety_notes: COMMS is local-only and must not bypass ActionGate.

name: ObservaBit
operational_definition: One-byte deterministic control encoding for ObservaScript/L1 blocks: opcode, evidence flag, write intent, gate and handoff.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: ObservaBit is a control layer, not a general programming language replacement.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Compiles IR blocks into reversible bytecode that preserves write and gate constraints.
DO_deconstruction.residue: If gate is REVIEW/BLOCK or handoff is required, writes must be denied.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: bytecode hex plus validation report
IOI_recompilation.runtime_target: claudio core observabit and compiler tool
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Roundtrip, gate and write guards pass tests.

gates.condition: roundtrip and write guards pass
write guard fails

safety_notes: ObservaBit does not execute side effects; it only validates control intent.

name: L0
operational_definition: Minimal bit machine for observable bytecode operations with trace, output and residue measurement.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: L0 proves local control paths only, not physics or AGI.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Executes minimal instructions so higher layers can be falsed against observable traces.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Program simplicity and reproducibility remain required.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: program bytecode with trace and hamming residue
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Assembler, run and residue tests pass.

gates.condition: local tests pass and bytecode is reproducible
program has no simpler falsifier or trace evidence

safety_notes: Keep L0 local research until language contract is frozen.

name: L1
operational_definition: Intermediate representation with five verbs that compiles observable task control to L0 bytecode and an ObservationEnvelope.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: L1 is a strict control IR, not a broad natural language interpreter.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Forces tasks to cite evidence, checks and handoff before action.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Failed checks remain REVIEW, not success.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: L1 script compiled to bytecode and envelope
IOI_recompilation.runtime_target: research obs_l1_ir and future COMMS/ActionGate bridge
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Five-verb program compiles, checks and emits correct gate.

gates.condition: checks pass and envelope evidence exists
verification fails or evidence missing

safety_notes: L1 must connect to COMMS and ActionGate before controlling real writes.

name: L2
operational_definition: Planned human-facing DSL for tasks, gates, evidence and artifacts that must lower to L1 or remain narrative.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: L2 is not fully implemented in this canon cut.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Provides ergonomic surface only if it compiles down to L1 verbs and evidence.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Ambiguous text must not authorize action.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: future DSL statement lowered to L1
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Every L2 claim lowers to L1 or fails validation.

invariants: no action if it cannot lower to L1

gates.condition: L2 remains design/hypothesis
L2 tries to execute without L1 or ActionGate

safety_notes: Treat L2 as planned surface until implemented and tested.

name: SleepGC
operational_definition: Cleanup recommendation generated when gate reasons or metric state indicate residue should be compacted before more action.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: SleepGC is operational cleanup, not biological sleep science.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Converts high residue or gate reasons into compact/cleanup guidance.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Must stay advisory unless a separate ActionGate permits writes/deletions.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: sleep_gc block in engineering report
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: SleepGC emits recommendation without destructive action.

gates.condition: cleanup is suggested but not authorized
destructive cleanup lacks ficha/hash/gate

safety_notes: Advisory only; deletion/move remains gated.

name: RegimeAutomaton
operational_definition: State classifier that maps R, Phi_eff, epsilon and signals into operational regimes for action pacing.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: Regime labels are local control states, not diagnoses.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Determines whether the system continues, watches, compacts or blocks.
DO_deconstruction.residue: The automaton must be recalibrated per runtime and cannot diagnose humans.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: regime enum/classifier output
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Classifier output is bounded and paired with safety notes.

invariants: regime is not a medical label
falsifiers: R >= J_c but regime is CLEAR

gates.condition: regime is proxy/control state
regime used as medical or universal claim

safety_notes: Use for operational pacing only.

name: HandoffSnapshot
operational_definition: Closure package that transfers state, evidence, residual risk and next action between agents or sessions.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: Handoff is continuity, not proof of task completion.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Prevents context loss and overwrites across agents.
DO_deconstruction.residue: If evidence or owner is missing the next action remains REVIEW.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: handoff markdown or JSONL event with envelope evidence
IOI_recompilation.runtime_target: COMMS handoffs and L1 HANDOFF verb
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Handoff cites source, evidence and next gate.

invariants: handoff does not overwrite source work

gates.condition: handoff is incomplete or ownership uncertain
handoff is local, append-only and cites evidence

safety_notes: Handoff can transfer work, not permission for external actions.

name: DUAT
operational_definition: Split research/product lane: public synthetic DUAT Genesis plus private DUAT/GEODIA internal motor with falsifiers and claim boundaries.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: DUAT is not validated prediction or science in this canon pass.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Provides scenario simulation, reports, falsifiers and source governance.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Public lane must exclude private Geodia/RPG engineering and strong claims.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: DUAT run/report/falsifier or source intake
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Claims are synthetic/internal and falsifiers pass.

falsifiers: private engineering appears in public package

gates.condition: research/internal claim
Geodia or RPG private material enters open-dev

safety_notes: Keep DUAT Genesis public/synthetic separate from DUAT Geodia private/internal.

name: WorldPulse
operational_definition: Private gameplay bridge concept that converts DUAT/Observacionismo signals into zone health, events, rumors, quests and NPC memory.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: Private RPG/gameplay concept; not public science or open-dev package.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Maps observed world signals into diegetic game events under private boundary.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Root canon has design docs; current private runtime evidence must stay private.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: LivingWorldEvent contract or private bridge event
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Event remains private, cites evidence URI and does not leak assets.

invariants: no public export of full event
no private RPG assets in open-dev
falsifiers: gameplay claim presented as real science

gates.condition: design concept without public runtime proof in root
private RPG data moves to open/public package

safety_notes: Do not mix private RPG source with open-dev public canon.

name: source_registry
operational_definition: Registry that records source classification, hashes, provenance, allowed extracts, blocked claims and publication gates.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: Registry is governance evidence, not automatic permission to publish.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Prevents raw sources from becoming canon or product without ficha and boundary.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Unknown sources remain REVIEW until classified.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: source intake registry row or local source intake artifact
IOI_recompilation.runtime_target: Curador SETO, GEODIA source registry and release governance
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Every source-backed claim cites a classified source and gate.

gates.condition: source is classified and local-safe
source is private/secret/strong claim without review

safety_notes: Ficha before copy, move, delete, publish or canon promotion.

name: falsifier
operational_definition: Explicit condition that can break, downgrade or block a claim if evidence, method or boundary fails.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: A falsifier is a testable guard, not proof that a claim is true.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Forces claims to include conditions that can fail before publication or action.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Claims without falsifiers remain REVIEW/BLOCK depending risk.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: falsifier list in concept, envelope, DUAT result or selfCheck
IOI_recompilation.runtime_target: obsai-core, ResidueOS, DUAT Genesis and concept validator
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Controlled claims without falsifiers fail validation.

gates.condition: falsifiers pass for local operational claim
strong claim lacks falsifier or evidence

safety_notes: Falsifiers reduce claim risk; they do not authorize overclaiming.

name: Wabi-Sabi Control Node
operational_definition: Local sensory-cognitive control node that routes stimuli, estimates operational state, delegates to agents, reviews evidence and compiles final output under ActionGate.

DO_deconstruction.narrative_boundary: Wabi-Sabi is not the brain, not an AGI, not a total memory and not an absolute authority.
DO_deconstruction.technical_function: Deconstructs stimulus, recompiles task, translates per agent, delegates, reviews coherence and emits corrective or final artifacts.
DO_deconstruction.residue: Current implementation is local-first and policy-gated; specialist knowledge must be loaded from Matrix/Biblioteca only when needed.

IOI_recompilation.validable_object: control-node concept record plus local CLI/COMMS evidence
IOI_recompilation.pass_condition: Wabi-Sabi stays local, gated, evidence-first and does not publish/delete/modify outside permission.

invariants: no weight training or total knowledge hoarding
falsifiers: Wabi-Sabi publishes or deletes without gate

gates.condition: policy-only learning or cross-agent orchestration
external action, model weights, publication or deletion without gate

safety_notes: Wabi-Sabi reduces R and compiles verifiable output; it does not replace the user or specialist agents.
